name: Eem Triplin
description: '''Naeem Muhammad Triplin''' (born February 13, 2001), known professionally as '''Eem Triplin''', is an American rapper and record producer. Originally a record producer for rappers such as [[Snot (rapper)|$not]], he went viral in 2022 for his song "[[Awkward Freestyle]]". He signed with [[RCA Records]] to release his debut studio album, ''Melody of a Memory'' (2025). Eem is known for his unique, laid-back vocals and [[plugg music|plugg]] style that has been compared to [[454 (rapper)|454]].
